hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】特朗普称他已成为“加密货币大佬”后，比特币反弹；【FINANCE】会议记录显示，美联储官员在上次会议上对利率方向存在分歧；【FINANCE】美联储会议纪要显示利率问题上的“家庭斗争”。争吵可能会持续一段时间。

items.title: Bitcoin rebounds after Trump says he's become 'a big crypto guy'
items.summary: Earlier, bitcoin fell toward $60,000 after Strategy disclosed the sale of more of its holdings of the token.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称他已成为“加密货币大佬”后，比特币反弹
items.summary_zh: 早些时候，在 Strategy 披露出售更多所持代币后，比特币跌至 60,000 美元。

items.title: Fed officials were split on direction of interest rates at last meeting, minutes show
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released minutes from its June 16-17 meeting.
items.title_zh: 会议记录显示，美联储官员在上次会议上对利率方向存在分歧
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三发布了 6 月 16 日至 17 日会议纪要。

items.title: Fed meeting minutes to show 'family fight' over rates. The squabble could drag on for a while
items.summary: There have been few instances over the past 35 years or so when the Fed has only made one rate move, be it up or down.
items.title_zh: 美联储会议纪要显示利率问题上的“家庭斗争”。争吵可能会持续一段时间
items.summary_zh: 在过去 35 年左右的时间里，美联储只进行一次利率调整的情况很少见，无论是上调还是下调。

items.title: International court tells BBC of breakthrough in Sudan war crimes probe
items.summary: The ICC has been looking into atrocities committed in Darfur over the past three years.
items.title_zh: 国际法庭告诉 BBC 苏丹战争罪调查取得突破
items.summary_zh: 国际刑事法院过去三年一直在调查达尔富尔发生的暴行。

items.title: Sony secures conditional approval to set up U.S. stablecoin trust bank
items.summary: The New York-based subsidiary, fully owned by Sony Bank, will be capitalized with $40 million to support its upcoming stablecoin business operations.
items.title_zh: 索尼获得有条件批准设立美国稳定币信托银行
items.summary_zh: 这家总部位于纽约的子公司由索尼银行全资拥有，将获得 4000 万美元的资本，以支持其即将推出的稳定币业务运营。

items.title: Sony Bank gets conditional OCC approval for US trust bank to issue dollar-backed stablecoin
items.summary: The trust bank subsidiary, Connectia Trust, is expected to issue and manage a dollar-backed stablecoin, pending final approval.
items.title_zh: 索尼银行获得美国信托银行有条件批准发行美元支持的稳定币
items.summary_zh: 信托银行子公司 Connectia Trust 预计将发行和管理美元支持的稳定币，目前正在等待最终批准。

items.title: Crypto trader applies legendary HODL strategy to EUR/USD forex bet
items.summary: A trader on Ostium has held a $1.14 million long position in EUR/USD perpetual futures for 400 days, applying a bitcoin-style HODLing strategy to forex.
items.title_zh: 加密货币交易者将传奇的 HODL 策略应用于欧元/美元外汇押注
items.summary_zh: Ostium 的一名交易员持有 114 万美元的欧元/美元永续期货多头头寸 400 天，将比特币式的 HODLing 策略应用于外汇。

items.title: BitGo CEO says single-digit percentages of bitcoin’s supply are ‘probably right’ for large holders amid Strategy’s sale
items.summary: BitGo CEO Mike Belshe said single-digit bitcoin ownership levels make sense for large holders like Strategy after its $216 million sale.
items.title_zh: BitGo首席执行官表示，在Strategy出售期间，比特币供应量的个位数百分比对于大持有者来说“可能是正确的”
items.summary_zh: BitGo 首席执行官 Mike Belshe 表示，在出售 2.16 亿美元后，对于像 Strategy 这样的大持有者来说，个位数的比特币所有权水平是有意义的。

items.title: Swift launches blockchain ledger for tokenized deposit pilot with 17 banks
items.summary: Swift launched a blockchain-based ledger that enables 17 banks to pilot 24/7 cross-border payments using tokenized deposits.
items.title_zh: Swift 与 17 家银行合作推出区块链分类账，进行代币化存款试点
items.summary_zh: Swift 推出了基于区块链的分类账，使 17 家银行能够使用代币化存款试点 24/7 跨境支付。

items.title: Russia’s Alfa Bank plans to launch digital depository to offer crypto services: report
items.summary: The move aligns with similar announcements from other major Russian banks, amid the development of the country's crypto law.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯阿尔法银行计划推出数字存管以提供加密服务：报告
items.summary_zh: 此举与俄罗斯其他主要银行在该国加密法制定过程中发布的类似公告一致。

items.title: How novice coders can develop AI programs for military applications
items.summary: A USAF cadet and a Lincoln Laboratory researcher found AI chatbots can help nontechnical service members produce viable software applications for their unique problems.
items.title_zh: 新手程序员如何开发军事应用的人工智能程序
items.summary_zh: 一名美国空军学员和一名林肯实验室研究人员发现，人工智能聊天机器人可以帮助非技术服务人员针对其独特问题开发可行的软件应用程序。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
items.summary: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.
items.title_zh: 中国通过 Anthropic 的克劳德代码警告人工智能风险
items.summary_zh: 中国表示，克劳德代码的特定版本存在后门漏洞，可以将敏感信息发送到远程服务器。

items.title: Traders on Kalshi think the Nasdaq-100 will end 2026 above 30,000, predicting a cooler second half of the year
items.summary: Speculators think the massive rally in the Nasdaq-100 since the lows following the U.S.-Iran war will be more subdued in the second half of 2026.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 交易员认为纳斯达克 100 指数到 2026 年年底将突破 30,000 点，并预测今年下半年会更加凉爽
items.summary_zh: 投机者认为，纳斯达克 100 指数自美伊战争后低点以来的大幅上涨将在 2026 年下半年受到抑制。

items.title: Klarna seeks U.S. bank charter in latest push beyond buy now, pay later
items.summary: Klarna joins a wave of fintech and crypto firms seeking entry to the traditional banking system.
items.title_zh: 克拉纳寻求美国银行牌照，以超越“先买后付”的最新举措
items.summary_zh: Klarna 加入了寻求进入传统银行系统的金融科技和加密货币公司浪潮。

items.title: US and Iran trade strikes for second night in a row after Trump declares ceasefire 'over'
items.summary: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has dropped 'dramatically' since the lastest attacks began.
items.title_zh: 特朗普宣布停火“结束”后，美国和伊朗连续第二天晚上进行贸易打击
items.summary_zh: 自最近一次袭击开始以来，霍尔木兹海峡的交通量“急剧”下降。

items.title: Platner's disastrous candidacy exposes rifts that could dampen Democrats' Senate hopes
items.summary: Along with creating tumult in a must-win race for Democrats, Graham Platner's exit is laying bare division between the party's left wing and moderates.
items.title_zh: 普拉特纳灾难性的候选资格暴露了可能削弱民主党参议院希望的分歧
items.summary_zh: 格雷厄姆·普拉特纳的退出除了在民主党必胜的竞选中制造骚乱之外，还暴露了该党左翼和温和派之间的分歧。

items.title: As More Remains Are Found in Rubble From Venezuela Earthquakes, Horror Becomes Routine
items.summary: Fearful that officials would tear down damaged buildings without accounting for any remaining bodies, Venezuelans are desperately digging for their relatives’ remains.
items.title_zh: 随着委内瑞拉地震废墟中发现更多遗骸，恐怖事件变得司空见惯
items.summary_zh: 由于担心官员会在不考虑任何剩余尸体的情况下拆除受损的建筑物，委内瑞拉人正在拼命挖掘亲属的遗骸。

items.title: Over $7.2 billion have migrated from LayerZero to Chainlink CCIP as Mantle joins exodus
items.summary: Migrations to Chainlink CCIP so far include Kelp and Lombard, both of which brought over $1 billion, as well as Solv Protocol, Virtuals, Re and Kraken’s tokenized assets.
items.title_zh: 随着 Mantle 加入外流行列，超过 72 亿美元已从 LayerZero 迁移到 Chainlink CCIP
items.summary_zh: 到目前为止，迁移到 Chainlink CCIP 的包括 Kelp 和 Lombard（两者都带来了超过 10 亿美元的资金），以及 Solv Protocol、Virtuals、Re 和 Kraken 的代币化资产。

items.title: Swift rolls out new blockchain ledger to bring 24/7 banking to 17 global giants
items.summary: HSBC, UBS, Wells Fargo and Citi are among the 17 banks now preparing to pilot live transactions using tokenized digital assets on Swift’s new blockchain payments platform.
items.title_zh: Swift 推出新的区块链分类账，为 17 个全球巨头带来 24/7 银行业务
items.summary_zh: 汇丰银行、瑞银集团、富国银行和花旗银行等 17 家银行目前正准备在 Swift 的新区块链支付平台上使用代币化数字资产进行实时交易试点。

items.title: Crypto hack losses fall below $1 billion in H1 2026 despite record attack volume: Immunefi
items.summary: Crypto hacks hit a record 207 incidents in H1 2026, but losses fell to $972M as DeFi exploit damage dropped 74% from 2022, per Immunefi.
items.title_zh: 尽管攻击量创纪录，但 2026 年上半年加密货币黑客损失仍降至 10 亿美元以下：Immunefi
items.summary_zh: 根据 Immunefi 的数据，2026 年上半年加密货币黑客攻击事件达到创纪录的 207 起，但随着 DeFi 漏洞利用造成的损失较 2022 年下降 74%，损失降至 9.72 亿美元。

items.title: Aave Labs rolls out Stable Vaults, offering predictable stablecoin yield aimed at mainstream users
items.summary: Stable Vaults will continuously “optimize capital allocation” across DeFi yield strategies, like Aave V3 and V4 markets.
items.title_zh: Aave Labs 推出稳定金库，为主流用户提供可预测的稳定币收益
items.summary_zh: Stable Vaults 将持续在 DeFi 收益策略（如 Aave V3 和 V4 市场）中“优化资本配置”。

items.title: CFTC Chair Selig warns regulators will end up ‘writing all the rules’ for crypto if Clarity Act stalls
items.summary: CFTC Chair Michael Selig warned regulators may end up writing crypto rules if Congress fails to pass the Clarity Act.
items.title_zh: CFTC 主席塞利格警告称，如果《澄清法案》停滞不前，监管机构最终将为加密货币“制定所有规则”
items.summary_zh: CFTC 主席 Michael Selig 警告称，如果国会未能通过《澄清法案》，监管机构最终可能会制定加密货币规则。

items.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
items.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.
items.title_zh: 核心转储流行病学：修复 18 年前的错误
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 工程师使用大规模核心转储分析来调试罕见的基础设施崩溃，发现硬件故障和长期存在的软件错误。

items.title: PRX Part 4: Our Data Strategy
items.title_zh: PRX 第 4 部分：我们的数据策略

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Toward a future that preserves benefits of neurotechnology for all
items.summary: PhD student Rachel Sava, winner of the Envisioning the Future of Computing Prize, explores transformative improvements and dystopian risks of neural technology.
items.title_zh: 迈向一个让所有人都能受益于神经技术的未来
items.summary_zh: 博士生 Rachel Sava 是“展望计算未来”奖的获得者，她探索了神经技术的变革性改进和反乌托邦风险。

items.title: Watch: We're a step closer to finding out if bees have feelings, here's why
items.summary: New research found bumblebees showed "emotion-like behaviours" previously only seen in mammals.
items.title_zh: 观察：我们距离查明蜜蜂是否有感情又近了一步，原因如下
items.summary_zh: 新的研究发现，大黄蜂表现出以前只在哺乳动物中看到的“类似情感的行为”。

items.title: Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Sink Into Violent Cycle After Latest Strikes
items.summary: Attacks on ships were followed by new U.S. strikes on Iran, which responded by firing at Gulf nations. The pattern of hostilities has all but collapsed a cease-fire, with little sign that either side will step back.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：美国和伊朗在最近的袭击后陷入暴力循环
items.summary_zh: 在袭击船只之后，美国又对伊朗发动了新的打击，伊朗则向海湾国家开火作为回应。敌对行动的模式几乎破坏了停火协议，几乎没有迹象表明双方会后退。

items.title: Le Pen Launches Presidential Campaign, in a Twist for French Politics
items.summary: The day after a court decided the far-right leader Marine Le Pen could run for office again, cheers and boos met her campaign kickoff in a rural stronghold.
items.title_zh: 勒庞发起总统竞选，法国政治发生转折
items.summary_zh: 法院裁定极右翼领导人马琳·勒庞可以再次竞选公职的第二天，在一个乡村据点，她的竞选活动开始时爆发出欢呼声和嘘声。

items.title: Latin America’s biggest stock exchange now offers options on bitcoin, ether and solana futures
items.summary: These options settle into underlying futures contracts rather than spot cryptoassets, involving no custody, transfer, or administration of tokens.
items.title_zh: 拉丁美洲最大的证券交易所现在提供比特币、以太币和 solana 期货期权
items.summary_zh: 这些期权结算为基础期货合约，而不是现货加密资产，不涉及代币的托管、转让或管理。

items.title: Crypto remains resilient in face of renewed Middle East tensions
items.summary: BTC rose 1.2% to $63,000 and Nasdaq futures jumped 2.6% with markets seemingly unconcerned by U.S. airstrikes on Iran. Bitcoin is now up 9% since the end of June.
items.title_zh: 面对新一轮的中东紧张局势，加密货币仍保持弹性
items.summary_zh: 比特币上涨 1.2%，至 63,000 美元，纳斯达克期货上涨 2.6%，市场似乎并不关心美国对伊朗的空袭。自 6 月底以来，比特币现已上涨 9%。

items.title: BitGo introduces quantum protection for institutional Bitcoin wallets
items.summary: Some experts have argued the greater risks posed by quantum computing revolve around a failure to implement new technology.
items.title_zh: BitGo 为机构比特币钱包引入量子保护
items.summary_zh: 一些专家认为，量子计算带来的更大风险源于未能实施新技术。

items.title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.
items.title_zh: 我们与政府和国家安全伙伴关系的方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何处理政府和国家安全伙伴关系，以及负责任的人工智能使用、民主问责和公共安全的原则。

items.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
items.summary: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
items.title_zh: 在编码评估中将信号与噪声分离

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Jesse Thaler named director of the Laboratory for Nuclear Science
items.summary: The professor of physics and inaugural director of the NSF AI Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Fundamental Interactions will lead LNS and continue his research in particle physics.
items.title_zh: 杰西·泰勒被任命为核科学实验室主任
items.summary_zh: 这位物理学教授兼 NSF AI 人工智能和基础相互作用研究所首任所长将领导 LNS 并继续他在粒子物理学方面的研究。

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等地方做家务，麻省理工学院的一种新方法使用一种语言模型来澄清用户的指令，然后使用另一种语言模型来忽略不相关的信息。

items.title: Michael Burry bets on sportsbooks DraftKings and Flutter, sees prediction markets curbed by regulation
items.summary: The investor believes regulators will eventually crack down on prediction markets after competition from the upstarts pressured the stocks of sportsbooks.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 押注体育博彩公司 DraftKings 和 Flutter，认为预测市场受到监管限制
items.summary_zh: 该投资者认为，在新贵的竞争给体育博彩公司的股票带来压力之后，监管机构最终将打击预测市场。

items.title: Strait of Hormuz traffic won't return to normal until 2027 after latest setback, Kalshi traders predict
items.summary: Speculators now see just a 43% chance that traffic flows return to normal by Dec. 1.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商预测，在经历了最近的挫折后，霍尔木兹海峡的交通要到 2027 年才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 投机者现在认为交通流量在 12 月 1 日之前恢复正常的可能性只有 43%。

items.title: Buy these quality, low-stress stocks for the summer, says Jefferies
items.summary: This summer, Jefferies recommends focusing on some high-quality stocks that have been left behind by the AI momentum trade.
items.title_zh: 杰富瑞表示，在夏季购买这些优质、低压力的股票
items.summary_zh: 今年夏天，杰富瑞建议关注一些被人工智能动能交易抛在后面的优质股票。

items.title: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
items.summary: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.
items.title_zh: 世界杯使得预测市场量飙升至历史新高
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 和 Polymarket 的交易量在 6 月份均创下历史新高。新的预测市场平台 Rothera 也能够管理 20 亿美元的交易量。

items.title: Democrat Graham Platner suspends campaign for key US Senate race after assault allegation
items.summary: The decision came days after a woman accused him of sexual assault, an accusation he says is "categorically false".
items.title_zh: 民主党人格雷厄姆·普拉特纳因袭击指控而暂停美国参议院关键竞选活动
items.summary_zh: 这一决定是在一名妇女指控他性侵犯几天后做出的，他说这一指控“绝对是错误的”。

items.title: It was 'love at first sight' with their adopted baby. Then they were told he may have been trafficked
items.summary: When they adopted Marcus, David and Ally's dream of having a child was complete - but now they could lose him.
items.title_zh: 这是对他们收养的孩子的“一见钟情”。然后他们被告知他可能被拐卖了
items.summary_zh: 当他们收养马库斯时，大卫和艾莉的生孩子梦想就完成了，但现在他们可能会失去他。

items.title: Ukraine to get licence to produce Patriot missiles, Trump says
items.summary: Although the Patriots are highly effective against Russia's ballistic missiles, they also have lengthy production times.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称乌克兰将获得生产爱国者导弹的许可证
items.summary_zh: 尽管爱国者导弹对俄罗斯弹道导弹非常有效，但其生产时间也很长。

items.title: Starmer gifted gun and ammunition by Turkish president at Nato
items.summary: The weapon has not been brought back to the UK and has instead been left with British officials in Turkey.
items.title_zh: 斯塔默向北约土耳其总统赠送枪支和弹药
items.summary_zh: 该武器尚未被带回英国，而是留在土耳其的英国官员手中。

items.title: Wealthy AI workers send San Francisco house prices soaring
items.summary: The median cost of a home in the city is now $1.7m, a record high, according to the latest figures.
items.title_zh: 富有的人工智能工作者推动旧金山房价飙升
items.summary_zh: 根据最新数据，该市房屋的中位成本目前为 170 万美元，创历史新高。

items.title: Arizona toddler found alive in morgue after being declared dead from drowning
items.summary: After he was discovered to still be alive, the 18-month-old was flown to another hospital and survived.
items.title_zh: 亚利桑那州一名幼儿在被宣布溺水死亡后在太平间被发现还活着
items.summary_zh: 在被发现仍然活着后，这位 18 个月大的孩子被空运到另一家医院并幸存下来。

items.title: Tanker Attacks Risk Overplaying Iran’s Hand, Analysts Say
items.summary: Iran’s history shows it is willing to dig in, even when it may suffer big losses.
items.title_zh: 分析人士称，油轮袭击可能会加剧伊朗的影响力
items.summary_zh: 伊朗的历史表明，即使可能遭受巨大损失，它也愿意坚持到底。

items.title: At NATO Summit, Trump Puts on a Show While Europe Gets Down to Business
items.summary: While President Trump insulted allies and demanded loyalty, the military alliance moved quietly closer to accepting more European responsibility for defense.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在北约峰会上表演，而欧洲则开始做生意
items.summary_zh: 尽管特朗普总统侮辱盟友并要求忠诚，但军事联盟却悄然接近接受更多欧洲的防务责任。

items.title: Why India Has Spent Years Blocking the Release of Diljit Dosanjh’s ‘Satluj’
items.summary: Censors demanded 127 cuts to the film that explores a dark period of police brutality in Punjab state. Filmmakers say it’s the latest, chilling example of entrenched censorship.
items.title_zh: 为什么印度多年来一直阻止迪尔吉特·多桑吉 (Diljit Dosanjh) 的《萨特鲁吉》(Satluj) 上映
items.summary_zh: 审查员要求对这部探讨旁遮普邦警察暴行黑暗时期的影片进行 127 次剪辑。电影制片人表示，这是根深蒂固的审查制度的最新、令人不寒而栗的例子。

items.title: Mexico Investigates Possible F.B.I. Role in El Mayo Arrest
items.summary: Accusations that the United States lied about its involvement in the notorious drug lord’s capture renewed controversy over an issue that has strained the U.S.-Mexico relationship.
items.title_zh: 墨西哥调查可能的联邦调查局在埃尔梅奥逮捕中的角色
items.summary_zh: 有人指责美国在抓获臭名昭著的毒枭的过程中撒谎，这一问题再次引起了美墨关系紧张的争议。

items.title: Internal File Finds I.C.C. Prosecutor Engaged in Sexual Harassment
items.summary: The confidential report will be considered by International Criminal Court members as they vote on whether to remove the top official.
items.title_zh: 内部文件找到 I.C.C.检察官涉嫌性骚扰
items.summary_zh: 国际刑事法院成员在投票决定是否罢免高级官员时将考虑这份机密报告。

items.title: Trump’s Arrival in Turkey for NATO Summit Adds Drama and Spectacle
items.summary: The second President Trump landed in Turkey, the center of gravity shifted right to where he likes it best: himself.
items.title_zh: 特朗普抵达土耳其参加北约峰会增添戏剧性和奇观
items.summary_zh: 第二任特朗普总统登陆土耳其后，重心右移到了他最喜欢的地方：他自己。

items.title: Heartbreak and Anger in Egypt Over a Stinging World Cup Loss to Argentina
items.summary: After watching Egypt lead for almost the entire match, a last-minute victory by Argentina has driven fans to tears and conspiracy theories.
items.title_zh: 世界杯惨败给阿根廷，埃及人心碎又愤怒
items.summary_zh: 在观看了埃及队几乎整场比赛的领先后，阿根廷队在最后一刻的胜利让球迷们泪流满面，并产生了阴谋论。

items.title: Aave rolls out vaults for yield-hungry fintech investors
items.summary: Aave's new Stable Vaults product lets wallets, exchanges and payment apps offer yields on stablecoin deposits
items.title_zh: Aave 为渴望收益的金融科技投资者推出金库
items.summary_zh: Aave 的新 Stable Vaults 产品可让钱包、交易所和支付应用程序提供稳定币存款收益

items.title: Age verification is the surveillance nobody voted for
items.summary: KOSA and Chat Control both retreated on their most-criticized measures this week, but both kept mandatory age verification, the quiet mechanism that turns anonymous browsing into identified browsing for all of us, argues Billions CEO Evin McMullen.
items.title_zh: 年龄验证是无人投票支持的监视
items.summary_zh: Billions 首席执行官埃文·麦克穆伦 (Evin McMullen) 表示，KOSA 和 Chat Control 本周都在最受批评的措施上做出了让步，但都保留了强制性年龄验证，这是一种将我们所有人的匿名浏览转变为识别浏览的安静机制。

items.title: Singapore's Temasek investment fund says crypto is off the table, will focus on AI
items.summary: The $400 billion wealth fund plans to expand AI holdings to 15% of its portfolio by 2031 from the current 6%.
items.title_zh: 新加坡淡马锡投资基金表示不再考虑加密货币，将专注于人工智能
items.summary_zh: 这家价值 4000 亿美元的财富基金计划到 2031 年将人工智能持有量从目前的 6% 扩大到其投资组合的 15%。

items.title: Stripe-owned Privy and Jito co-develop Solana transaction inclusion tool FullSend
items.summary: FullSend works by automatically routing every transaction signed in a Privy wallet directly to the current Solana block-building leader.
items.title_zh: Stripe 旗下的 Privy 和 Jito 共同开发 Solana 交易包含工具 FullSend
items.summary_zh: FullSend 的工作原理是自动将在 Privy 钱包中签名的每笔交易直接路由到当前的 Solana 区块构建领导者。

items.title: INTERPOL-led global fraud crackdown arrests over 5,800, uncovers crypto laundering network tied to $122.5 million wallet
items.summary: The operation uncovered a crypto laundering network using cross-chain swaps to obscure funds, with one wallet processing $122.5M in 10 months.
items.title_zh: 国际刑警组织领导的全球反欺诈行动逮捕了 5,800 多人，揭露了与 1.225 亿美元钱包相关的加密货币洗钱网络
items.summary_zh: 该行动发现了一个利用跨链交换来掩盖资金的加密货币洗钱网络，一个钱包在 10 个月内处理了 1.225 亿美元。

items.title: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
items.summary: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.
items.title_zh: 帮助 K-12 教育工作者培养实用的人工智能技能
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Academy 和 Walton Family Foundation 正在推出 AI 技能实践实践活动，帮助 K-12 教育工作者在课堂上培养实用的 AI 技能。

items.title: Australian Payments Plus moves faster with ChatGPT and Codex
items.summary: See how Australian Payments Plus uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to move faster through payments complexity. AP+ saves time, improves quality, and keeps human judgment central.
items.title_zh: Australian Payment Plus 借助 ChatGPT 和 Codex 加快步伐
items.summary_zh: 了解 Australian Payments Plus 如何使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 更快地应对支付复杂性。 AP+ 可以节省时间、提高质量并以人类判断为中心。

items.title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
items.summary: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.
items.title_zh: MUFG 旨在通过 OpenAI 成为人工智能原生
items.summary_zh: MUFG 使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 构建人工智能原生组织、改进工作流程并大规模提供新的人工智能驱动的金融服务。

items.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
items.summary: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 的采用范围如何扩大
items.summary_zh: 新的 OpenAI Signals 数据显示了 ChatGPT 在全球范围内的采用情况如何增长，用户使用量不断增加，探索更多功能，并推动跨地区和语言的增长。

items.title_zh: Genebench-Pro 内部

items.title: Data for Agents
items.title_zh: 代理商数据

items.title_zh: 一键从 Hugging Face 到 Amazon SageMaker Studio

items.title_zh: 在任何云上运行 AI 工作负载，存储在 Hugging Face 上：使用 SkyPilot 实现零出口存储

items.title_zh: 乐机器人v0.6.0：想象、评估、改进

items.title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
items.title_zh: Hugging Face 和 Cerebras 将 Gemma 4 引入实时语音 AI

items.title_zh: ScarfBench：企业 Java 框架迁移的 AI 代理基准测试

items.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API:  background tasks, remote MCP and more
items.summary: We’re announcing new capabilities in Managed Agents in Gemini API so developers can build reliable, production-ready agents.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini API 中扩展托管代理：后台任务、远程 MCP 等
items.summary_zh: 我们宣布在 Gemini API 中的托管代理中提供新功能，以便开发人员可以构建可靠的、可用于生产的代理。

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.
items.title_zh: 开启英国的下一个生产力时代：建设一个人工智能开拓者的国家
items.summary_zh: 谷歌英国分享了最新的经济影响报告，以及如何让更多人享受到人工智能技术带来的好处。

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
items.title_zh: 问AI专家：全栈到底是什么？
items.summary_zh: 一位 Google 专家解释了采用全栈方法处理 AI 意味着什么，以及为什么它长期以来一直是我们 AI 工作的基础。

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: 我们正在通过新的投资和社区支持来加强我们在阿拉巴马州的业务。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布在 2026 年和 2027 年投资 15 亿美元，扩建其位于阿拉巴马州杰克逊县的数据中心园区。自 2019 年起在改造后的前…

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们在弗吉尼亚州的新社区投资支持当地就业并扩大能源负担能力。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: MIT in the media: Innovating and educating for the next 250 years of America
items.summary: During a "Washington Post Live" panel discussion with ASU President Michael Crow, President Sally Kornbluth explored how universities are preparing the next generation of scientists to lead in America’s rapidly changing technological landscape.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：为美国未来 250 年进行创新和教育
items.summary_zh: 在与亚利桑那州立大学校长迈克尔·克劳 (Michael Crow) 举行的“华盛顿邮报直播”小组讨论中，校长萨莉·科恩布鲁斯 (Sally Kornbluth) 探讨了大学如何培养下一代科学家，以引领美国快速变化的技术格局。

items.title: Q&A: What is agentic AI today, and what do we want it to be?
items.summary: Computer scientist Phillip Isola cuts through the hype to explain how AI agents work and what the future might hold for this rapidly advancing technology.
items.title_zh: 问答：今天的代理人工智能是什么？我们希望它是什么？
items.summary_zh: 计算机科学家 Phillip Isola 打破了炒作，解释了人工智能代理的工作原理以及这项快速发展的技术的未来。

items.title: 3 Questions: Beyond data-driven aesthetics
items.summary: In a new Keller Gallery exhibition, Alexandros Haridis SM ’17, PhD ’22 traces centuries of ideas about aesthetic judgment and explores how design can make complex computational systems visible.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：超越数据驱动的美学
items.summary_zh: 在凯勒画廊的新展览中，Alexandros Haridis SM '17、PhD '22 追溯了几个世纪以来有关审美判断的想法，并探索了设计如何使复杂的计算系统变得可见。

items.title: MIT in the media: Exploring how curiosity-driven science is an essential ingredient in America’s success
items.summary: “Scientific American” showcases the history and future of America’s scientific engine, highlighting promising young scientists and icons at MIT and beyond.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：探索好奇心驱动的科学如何成为美国成功的重要因素
items.summary_zh: 《科学美国人》展示了美国科学引擎的历史和未来，重点关注麻省理工学院及其他地区有前途的年轻科学家和偶像。
